title: Mastering `font-display` for Superior Web Font Loading & UX
tweet: Boost your website's perceived performance and #UX! Learn how `font-display` CSS property elegantly manages web font loading, preventing unsightly Flash of Invisible Text (FOIT) or Flash of Unstyled Text (FOUT). #CSSTypography #WebFonts #UIDesign
tip: Always declare `font-display` within your `@font-face` rules. Using `font-display: swap;` is often the optimal choice for primary content fonts, allowing the browser to render text immediately with a fallback font and swap to the custom web font once loaded. This significantly improves perceived performance and user experience by avoiding a blank screen or layout shift.
